name: Tonio Trussardi
nativeName: トニオ・トラサルディー
description: Tonio is a man of average to above-average height and medium build. He keeps short, light, neat hair; and he often wears a genial expression. Tonio is only shown in his chef's uniform, comprising a light or white double-breasted jacket, a loose tie, an apron, and a tall, cylindrical hat. He wears the small, metallic emblem of a "T" at the upper corners of the chest his jacket and apron, and at the frontal fold of his hat. (Source: JoJo's Bizarre Encyclopedia)

name: Aria Holmes Kanzaki
description: **Height:** 148 cm (4'10") Aria Holmes Kanzaki is a 2nd-year high school student who belongs to the assault class. She's half-English and half-Japanese. She's small enough to be mistaken for a grade school kid, but her skill as a Butei is S rank. Her weapons of choice are a Chrome and Steel M1911A1 Government Model and two swords (hence the name "Quadra Aria").

name: Arata Shindou
description: An Inspector assigned to Unit One of Public Safety Bureau. He is a Rank A Mentalist, capable of empathizing with other people to an extreme degree. description: Mu Qing is a supporting character in Heaven Official's Blessing. Mu Qing is a Martial God who oversees the southwest. Eight hundred years ago, he was the personal attendant of Xie Lian.
